fields.name: Harshit Tiwari
fields.title: Python Developer | Django & Odoo 17 Developer
fields.tagline: Python Developer with expertise in Odoo 17 custom modules and Django full-stack development, building secure and scalable web applications.
fields.bio: Python Developer and Software Engineer with hands-on expertise in Odoo 17 custom module development and Django full-stack web application development. Proficient in ERP customization, business workflow automation, Python ORM, XML/QWeb view design, RESTful API development, and Django REST Framework (DRF). Experienced with Linux/Ubuntu Odoo environments, OAuth2 integration, and role-based access control. Actively seeking a Python Developer / Odoo / Django Developer role to deliver high-quality ERP solutions and web applications.

fields.title: Personal Health Management Module
fields.description:
Architected and developed a production-ready custom Odoo 17 ERP module from scratch on Linux/Ubuntu following Odoo module structure, manifest configuration, and software engineering best practices.

Key Highlights:
• Defined custom model (models.Model) with Odoo-typed fields — Float, Date, Char — to store personal health records: Height, Weight, and Date of Birth
• Implemented computed fields using @api.depends for real-time BMI and Age auto-calculation with correctly chained ORM lifecycle hooks
• Built a Wizard (TransientModel) for a guided BMI assessment input flow with pop-up dialog view design
• Designed Form View, Tree View, and QWeb report template using Odoo XML for data entry and printable health summaries
• Applied BMI categorization business logic — Underweight, Normal, Overweight — using @api.constrains
• Wrote Python unit tests (unittest) to validate all computed field logic and BMI categorization before deployment
• Deployed and upgraded module via Odoo CLI scaffold, install, and update commands on local Odoo instance
fields.short_description: Custom Odoo 17 ERP module with BMI tracking, computed fields, QWeb reports, and Python unit tests on Linux.

fields.title: SecureVault KYC
fields.description:
Engineered a secure KYC (Know Your Customer) identity verification platform using Django and Django REST Framework with enterprise-grade security features.

Key Highlights:
• Engineered full-stack secure KYC platform with role-based access control (RBAC) and complete user lifecycle management
• Designed and implemented RESTful API endpoints for user registration, document upload, validation, and verification status following REST best practices
• Implemented secure password hashing using Python hashlib, multi-format document validation, and normalized SQLite relational database models
• Tested all API endpoints using Postman; validated authentication flows, HTTP status codes, and error handling across all routes
• Built responsive Bootstrap 5 UI with dynamic Django templates for registration, login, profile, and document submission workflows
• Applied CSRF protection, secure session management, and Django middleware configuration throughout
fields.short_description: Full-stack identity verification platform using Django REST Framework with RBAC, document upload, and Postman-tested APIs.

fields.title: E-Commerce Price Tracker
fields.description:
Built a full-stack Django web application to scrape and display real-time product prices from Amazon and Flipkart using Python Requests and BeautifulSoup.

Key Highlights:
• Developed a web scraping application using Python Requests and BeautifulSoup with a robust HTML parsing pipeline
• Extracted product names, prices, and metadata from Amazon and Flipkart; rendered results in a dynamic filterable tabular UI using Django templates
• Implemented complete Django user authentication — registration, login, logout — with session management and form validation
• Designed and built a user-friendly web interface to display scraped data in an organized, readable tabular format
• Handled edge cases like anti-scraping measures, dynamic content, and error handling for robust data extraction
fields.short_description: Django web app scraping real-time product prices from Amazon & Flipkart with user authentication and tabular UI.

fields.title: Recipe Management Platform
fields.description:
Created a feature-rich recipe management application allowing users to save, edit, search, and manage recipes efficiently.

Key Highlights:
• Developed a full-stack Django application with complete CRUD operations using Django ORM for effective data handling
• Implemented recipe search and filter functionality by name using Django ORM queries for fast lookups
• Built image upload support for recipe photos with Django's file handling and media management
• Designed a user-friendly dashboard for users to add and manage recipes with titles, descriptions, and images
• Built responsive Bootstrap UI with form validation, dynamic template rendering for consistent cross-device experience
fields.short_description: Full-stack Django app with complete CRUD, recipe search & filter, image upload, and responsive Bootstrap dashboard.

fields.title: Google Sign-In App
fields.description:
Integrated Google OAuth2 into a Django application implementing the complete authorization code flow with enterprise-grade security.

Key Highlights:
• Implemented full Google OAuth2 authorization code flow including consent screen, callback handler, and token exchange
• Configured auth-guarded views, secure session management, Django middleware configuration, and CSRF-protected redirect-based authentication
• Set up OAuth2 settings, URL routing, and Django middleware for seamless Google Sign-In user experience
• Implemented session tracking, secure logout, and user profile data retrieval from Google APIs
• Applied CSRF protection across all authentication routes and redirect flows
fields.short_description: Django app with full Google OAuth2 integration — authorization flow, callback handler, session management, and CSRF protection.

fields.description: Studied core CS fundamentals including data structures, algorithms, databases, operating systems, and software engineering. Developed multiple real-world projects using Python and Django.

fields.title: Django Web Development
fields.description: Building full-stack Django web applications with clean architecture, authentication, and responsive Bootstrap UIs.

fields.title: Odoo Module Development
fields.description: Creating custom Odoo 17 ERP modules with Python ORM, XML views, QWeb reports, wizards, and business workflow automation.

fields.title: REST API Development
fields.description: Designing and building RESTful APIs using Django REST Framework with authentication, RBAC, and Postman testing.

fields.title: Web Scraping Solutions
fields.description: Building robust web scraping pipelines using Python, BeautifulSoup, and Requests to extract and process data at scale.

fields.title: Database Design
fields.description: Designing optimized relational database schemas using PostgreSQL and SQLite with Django ORM for scalable data persistence.

fields.title: OAuth2 & Secure Auth
fields.description: Implementing secure authentication systems including Google OAuth2, password hashing, RBAC, session management, and CSRF protection.
